subcodes.first_line: O Lord of Hosts, Educator of existence, and Creator of all beings! I implore Thee, casting myself upon the dust at the threshold of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب الجنود و مربی الوجود و موجد کل موجود اترامی فی سده رحمانیتک علی التراب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
